comment: Best park in NY! The high bars are perfect for freestyle and weighted pull-ups. Highly recommend!
Amazing community here. The floor is rubberized which is great for handstands, though it gets crowded after 5 PM.
The bars are solid and have excellent grip. Meets all my daily workout needs.
Great view of London while working out! The bars are a bit thick but overall fantastic setup.
Super peaceful in the mornings. There are gymnastics rings here which are rare for public parks!
Absolutely legendary. Every calisthenics athlete should visit this place at least once. Equipment is rugged and well-maintained.
Ropes and rings are in great condition. Training in the sea breeze is incomparable.
Amazing, but expect lots of tourists taking photos. Best to go early morning.
Incredible atmosphere. Met some of the best athletes here.
Beautiful workout spot next to the Nile. Good parallel bars, clean surroundings.
Great bars and friendly crowd. Usually easy to find free space to train.
Training with a view of Bondi Beach is unbeatable. Strong dip bars and high pull-up bars.
Equipment gets hot in the midday sun, but it has everything you need. Awesome crowd!
My favorite training spot in Sydney. Clean, safe, and right by the beach.
